The AI also acknowledges legitimate government investigations and unexplained phenomena, which validates some underlying premises without endorsing the conspiracy. This balanced approach challenges the misinformation firmly but with some agreeableness toward the user's skepticism, encouraging critical thinking without outright dismissal.
